description: Use when working on the MDS compilation pipeline, adding directives, built-in functions, default parameters, logical operators, or modifying scope/variable handling. Keywords: lexer, parser, evaluator, resolver, validator, builtins, Param, default arguments, And, Or, logical operators, ArityMismatch, BuiltinError, call_function, required_param_count, condvalue_to_value, MAX_LOGICAL_OPERANDS.
